title: Regolamenti dwar Virtual Financial Assets
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/590.1/mlt, expression eli/sl/590.1/20240630/mlt).

provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
VIRTUAL FINANCIAL ASSETS

[ L.S. 590.01

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 590.01
REGOLAMENTI DWAR VIRTUAL FINANCIAL
ASSETS
1 ta’ Novembru, 2018
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 357 tal-2018, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 25 u 332
tal-2022 u 134 u 296 tal-2024.

Dawn ir regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-Ilslien Ingliż biss.

1
